Description: Foreign key to Clients.Client ID. Primary key used by GET /client/kyc after login resolves clientId from JWT.
Reference only — must match the logged-in dealer email. KYC lookup uses Client ID from Clients table only.
Only Active rows are returned for auto-fill.

Display dealer name (may match trade name).
Account holder name as per bank records.
Preformatted label for read-only UI (e.g. Ajay Enterprises - 7905835489). Auto-computed if blank.
Internal ops notes. Not shown on application form.
